overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic urban street. The scene transitions from a covered pedestrian walkway under an overpass to open sunlit sidewalks lined with graffiti-covered walls, holographic billboards, and dense cyberpunk architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered transit walkway transitioning to open commercial street

events.description: exits covered overpass into open sunlit street area
moves from shadow of overpass into direct morning sunlight

agents.ego_description: character walks steadily along the sidewalk, passing under the concrete overpass and emerging into the sunlit street

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving along the street parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: large concrete highway overpass creating deep shadow over the walkway
modern glass facade building with reflective windows and metal framing
large pink holographic advertisement display floating above the street
yellow painted zebra crossing markings on the concrete ground

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a massive concrete overpass in shadow, with a modern glass building on the right. As the character moves forward, they emerge into bright morning sunlight, revealing a bustling cyberpunk street with holographic advertisements and passing vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: open commercial sidewalk with graffiti art and mixed pedestrian traffic

events.description: right side architecture changes from glass building to solid concrete graffiti wall
UI element 'THE GLEN' appears indicating entry into a new district area

agents.ego_description: character continues walking along the busy sidewalk, navigating through moderate pedestrian traffic in a commercial district

notable_agents.action: person in green tank top and camouflage pants walking toward the camera
shirtless pedestrian with tattoos walking away along the red pathway

entered.detail: tall concrete retaining wall covered with colorful street art and graffiti tags
distinctive red painted pedestrian pathway running parallel to the street
multi-story buildings with various storefronts, air conditioning units, and signage
metal industrial bridge spanning the street in the distance

segments.scene_description: Walking along an open commercial sidewalk, the scene transitions from modern glass architecture to a gritty concrete wall covered in vibrant graffiti. The red painted pedestrian path guides the character forward as various pedestrians pass by, and an overhead bridge becomes visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban pedestrian corridor with extensive graffiti and overhead industrial structures

events.description: graffiti on right wall becomes denser and more colorful with large murals
pedestrian in brown coat briefly passes in front of the camera view

agents.ego_description: character walks through the graffiti-lined urban corridor, approaching the overhead bridge structure while passing diverse pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person with colorful cybernetic leg implants and purple hair walking toward camera

entered.detail: large detailed graffiti artwork of a skull with text reading 'WHEN THE LIGHTS GO OUT'
metal catwalk and pipe structure crossing overhead between buildings

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through a dense urban canyon with extensive graffiti murals covering the right wall, including a prominent skull artwork. The character approaches the overhead metal bridge structure while walking along the red pathway, with industrial buildings lining the left side and moderate pedestrian traffic flowing in the opposite direction.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the cool shadows of a concrete overpass into a vibrant, sun-drenched cyberpunk thoroughfare. It begins beneath a massive overpass beside a modern glass building, moving forward until the character emerges into bright morning sunlight filled with holographic advertisements and passing vehicles. As the camera continues along the commercial sidewalk, the sleek glass architecture gives way to gritty concrete walls adorned with vibrant graffiti, following a red pedestrian path toward a distant overhead bridge. The scene then shifts into a dense urban canyon where extensive murals and a prominent skull artwork dominate the right wall, while industrial buildings line the left. Finally, the camera advances along the red pathway through a flow of oncoming pedestrians, approaching the looming metal structure of the overhead bridge.
